advisory.heading: Understand Your Speedtest
advisory.downloadOverTime: **Download Speed Over Time:** Shows consistency of connection
advisory.uploadOverTime: **Upload Speed Over Time:** Measures upload performance
advisory.appLatency: **App Latency:** Tracks how quickly your device reaches this service during the test

aiSummary.heading: AI-Powered Summary
aiSummary.placeholder: Your speed test summary will appear here after the system interprets the results.

howToUse.heading: Test your current network speed
howToUse.currentDevice: You can run a speed test from your current device and connection. If you're on home Wi-Fi, the results reflect your real-world experience right now.
howToUse.deviceToServer: It measures device-to-server performance, not a deep inspection of your router, signal strength, or every internal Wi-Fi detail.
howToUse.signedIn: Now that you are signed in, don't forget to check your test graphs and history below!
howToUse.signedOut: **Sign in** or **Sign up** to get more detailed insights about your network performance!

latencyNote.title: How Latency Is Measured
latencyNote.desc1: Quick app requests are sent to this service to estimate responsiveness from your current device and network.
latencyNote.desc2: This is useful for real browsing-style performance, but it is not the same as classic ICMP ping.
